name: Kyberion Promo 60s Narrated Demo
description: Produce a one-minute promo video that presents Kyberion as a governed execution layer with clearer scene changes and a more natural Japanese narration track.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

context.voice_script:
Kyberion は、運用の意図を、そのまま見せられる成果物に変えます。

最初に brief を受け取り、価値の軸、証拠、CTA を先に決めます。ここで重要なのは、見た目を盛ることではなく、何を伝えるかを固定することです。

次に、シーンごとの役割を分けます。見出し、比較、証拠、アウトロを切り替えながら、画面の流れだけでなく、根拠まで一緒に伝えます。

最後に、配信や LP にそのまま使える promo package として仕上げます。Kyberion なら、説明を資産に変えられます。
context.hook_text: Kyberion は、運用の意図を、そのまま見せられる成果物に変えます。
context.feature_text: まず brief で価値・証拠・CTA を固定し、次に scene ごとの役割で画面を切り替えます。
context.cta_text: Kyberion を使えば、説明で終わらない promo package をそのまま配信できます。

content.title: Kyberion Promo: One Minute of Value, Proof, and CTA
content.audience: teams evaluating whether Kyberion can turn operational intent into reusable evidence-backed output
content.objective: convert a fixed launch brief into a renderable one-minute promo package
content.promise: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs
content.desired_takeaway: the viewer can recognize value quickly and move to the next step
constraints: lead with value, not with setup
keep the CTA short and direct
make the visual beats feel distinct
proof_points: value is clear in the first beat
scene changes are obvious across the middle beats
CTA is explicit at the end
content_requirements: use different visual templates across beats

fixed_inputs.message: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs

params.content:
# Kyberion Promo 60s Narrated Demo

## Scenario flow
1. Receive a fixed launch brief with audience, value, proof, and CTA already decided.
2. Convert the brief into a promo-oriented content brief and storyboard.
3. Generate narration and compose the scene bundle.
4. Render, verify, extract key frames, and reject black-frame output.

## Output artifacts
- Content brief: `{{content_brief_path}}`
- Narration: `{{narration_path}}`
- Video: `{{video_output_path}}`
- Bundle: `{{video_bundle_dir}}`
- Key frames: `{{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-promo-60s-frames/`

## Validation
- `{{preflight_result}}`
- `{{voice_result}}`
- `{{video_result}}`
- `{{verify_result}}`
- `{{frame_extract_result}}`
- `{{blackframe_result}}`
- `{{duration_alignment_result}}`

## Next command
- `pnpm pipeline --input pipelines/kyberion-promo-60s-narrated-demo.json`

params.message: 🏁 [KYBERION-PROMO-60S] Narrated demo complete. Voice: {{voice_result}} Video: {{video_result}} Verify: {{verify_result}}
